veal-bourguignon-argiro.name: Veal Bourguignon
instructions: We will need a mantene vessel with a lid or a heavy pot that can be used in both the stove and oven.
To begin, place the vehicle in the fire. Heat some olive oil and add the panceta or bacon. Sauté for about 2 minutes until golden.
With a drilled spoon, transfer them to a platter and continue with the rest of the materials.
In the same oil, sauté the pieces from the comb, until evening golden on all sides, for 3–4 minutes. Transfer to a platter and set aside.
In the same pot, add the chopped onion and Carrot. Sauté until the onion is blued for about 4-5 minutes.
Then, add the browned meat and bacon to the pot. Mix to warm well.
Add the tomato paste and sauce for 1 minute, rubbing the bottom of the pot with a wooden seed to remove the delicious residues.
Sprinkle with the flour and mix for 1 more minute, so that the flour is cooked and the sauce thickens.
Add the wine and let it boil for about 3 minutes to evaporate the alcohol.
Add the beef broth, bay leaves and thyme.
Cover the vessel well: first with parchment paper, then with aluminum foil and finally with its heavy cap.

Transfer the vehicle to a pre-heated oven at 160°C and simmer for 2 hours and 30 minutes until the beat softens well without losing its liquids. In this way the meat does not dissolve, Keeps its structure and becomes a loukoumi.
After softening, carefully remove the meat from the sauce and transfer to a platter. Continue with the dressing.

vegetarian-moussaka-musaqaa.name: Vegetarian Moussaka (musaqa'a)

ingredients.item: Plus 1 tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil; plus more for drizzling
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep:
ribs and seeds removed, finely
chopped

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 400°. Divide 2 lb. Italian eggplants (5–6 medium), cut into ¾"-thick rounds, between 2 rimmed baking sheets and drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil; turn to coat. Season with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper. Roast until golden and tender, 30–35 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Cook 1 medium onion, finely chopped, stirring often, until softened, about 4 minutes. Add 2 medium green bell peppers, ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped, and 5 garlic cloves, finely chopped; cook, stirring, until garlic is softened, about 1 minute. Add 1 tsp. ground cumin, ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes, ½ tsp. ground cinnamon, ½ tsp. ground coriander, and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Add one 14.5-oz. can crushed tomatoes, 2 cups low-sodium vegetable broth, 1 cup split red lentils, rinsed, and 1 cup water and stir to combine. Increase heat to medium-high and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally and adding up to ½ cup more water if needed, until lentils are tender, 30–35 minutes (sauce should be Bolognese-like in consistency). Remove from heat and stir in 1 Tbsp. pomegranate molasses and 2 Tbsp. chopped cilantro. Taste sauce and season with more salt if needed.

Spread 2 cups sauce in a 13x9" baking dish. Top with half of eggplant slices. Repeat with another layer of sauce, then remaining eggplant. Drizzle remaining 1 Tbsp. oil extra-virgin olive oil over. Cover tightly with foil.
Bake musaqa’a 10 minutes. Uncover and continue to bake until bubbling, 10–15 minutes more. Let cool 5 minutes. Top with ¼ cup crumbled feta and cilantro leaves.

vegetarian-mushroom-gravy.name: Vegetarian Mushroom Gravy
instructions: Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add shallot and cook, stirring occasionally, until shallots are a deep golden brown, 2 to 3 minutes. Stir in mushrooms, garlic, salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until mushrooms are nicely browned, 3 to 5 minutes.

Pour sherry into the pan and bring to a boil while scraping the browned bits of food off the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon. Cook and stir until sherry is reduced, about 2 minutes. Remove mushroom mixture from the skillet and set aside.

Reduce heat to medium-low and melt remaining 3 tablespoons of butter in the skillet. Add flour to make a roux, stirring continuously, until mixture is light golden brown, about 2 minutes. Add vegetable broth and tarragon; whisk until gravy is smooth and no lumps of flour remain.

Increase heat to medium-high, return mushroom mixture to the skillet, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, until mixture has reduced, about 8 minutes. Stir in soy sauce. Adjust seasonings, if necessary.

vegetarian-sandwich-lezzet.name: Vegetarian Sandwich
instructions: 1. Cut and slice the ends of eggplants and pumpkins.
2. Salt peppers clean and cut to longitudinal.
3. Cut the breads into two and get 4 half bread.
4. Remove olive oil from eggplant and pepper slices and sprinkle salt and grill.
5. Divide breads and index eggplants, peppers and nuts respectively.
6. Spread the cheese of the boiled bag and decorate it with parsley, rezene and semitaste branches.
7. Serve.
8. You can also try avocado sandwich recipe.

veggie-packed-one-pot-split-pea-soup.name: Veggie-packed One-pot Split Pea Soup
instructions: On a cutting board, place the loaf of bread on its side and slice off the top portion. Using a small knife, cut around the inside of the bread, being careful not to cut through the sides, and scoop out the center of the roll. Save this for dipping later on or use for bread crumbs.
In a large soup pot, combine the olive oil, onions, carrots, and celery, and cook 5 minutes over medium heat until onions are translucent.
Add the garlic and cook 2 minutes.
Add the split peas, thyme, salt, pepper, tumeric, and red pepper flakes, and stir until well combined.
Add the vegetable stock and bay leaves, cover with a lid and cook for 40 minutes.
Add potatoes, then cover and cook 20 more minutes.
Remove bay leaves and serve soup in your bread bowl.
Enjoy!

venus-de-milo-soup.name: Venus De Milo Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Cook and stir ground beef in a large pot over medium heat until crumbly and browned, 7 to 10 minutes; drain as much fat from pot as possible. Add onion and garlic to the pot; cook and stir until onion is softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, onion soup mix, bouillon cubes, and bay leaf until well combined; stir in water and mixed vegetables. Increase heat to medium-high; bring to a boil.
Stir in orzo pasta; cook until pasta is tender yet firm to the bite, about 10 minutes. Season with salt and black pepper.

vinegar-chicken-with-barberries.name: Vinegar Chicken With Barberries

ingredients.prep: bone-in chicken legs (thigh and drumstick) or a mix of thighs and drumsticks

ingredients.item: Dried barberries or dried tart cherries

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Pat chicken dry with paper towels, then season all over with salt. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken, skin side down, until golden brown underneath, 7–10 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate, leaving any fat in the pan.

Remove pan from heat and let fat cool down a little (about 3 minutes should do it). Return pan to medium heat and add onion and garlic. Cook, stirring often and adding a splash of water if needed to keep onion from getting too dark, until onion is softened and golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Stir in barberries, turmeric, and red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Pour in vinegar and 1 cup water, season lightly with salt, and bring to a simmer.

Arrange chicken, skin side up, in sauce, then nestle orange halves, cut side down, around chicken. Transfer skillet to oven and bake, uncovered, until sauce is reduced and chicken is cooked through, 30–35 minutes (or 20–25 minutes for separated things and drumsticks).
Transfer chicken to a platter. Spoon sauce over, then squeeze juice from orange halves on top.

virgin-paloma-argiro.name: Virgin Paloma
instructions: In a small pot, add honey, ginger, lime and water.
From the time it boils, boil for 2′.
Remove from the fire and pour the mint in.
Set aside for 10′.
Dry the syrup and keep it in the refrigerator for the cocktails.

vori-vori-recipe-comedera.name: Vorí Vorí Recipe

ingredients.item: Caldo de la sopa de pollo  (para humedecer la harina)

instructions: Salpimienta las piezas de pollo.
In a frying pan with some oil, seal the chicken pieces and reserve.
Grain the vegetables to the same frying pan and pounce for 3 minutes.
En una olla profunda vierte el agua hirviendo con el pollo y los vegetales, agrega las hojas de laurel tapa y deja cocinar hasta que el pollo se cueza completamente.
En un bol agrega la harina junto al queso, humedece con caldo  del pollo hasta hacer una masa manejable. Deja reposar la masa por 5 minutos.
Make 1.5 cm in diameter balls and give them little by little to the broth.
Let them cook for 5 minutes inside the broth and then purify with an oregano and onions.
